message:
fix(mux): fix cursor position/width with actual ghostty padding and CSS container queries

- Use ghostty's actual padding (padding_top_px, padding_left_px) instead of
  guessing centered padding, fixing the 0.4% vertical offset
- Fix bar cursor width from 2px to 1px to match ghostty's visual rendering
- Replace JS objFitScale cursor math with CSS container query viewport that
  replicates object-fit:contain sizing identically
- Rename inner .panel to .panel-root to fix cursor blink CSS selector
- Remove dead ghostty_stub import and debug console.log statements
- Extend ghostty SurfaceSize C API with padding fields (vendor patch)
